summary: Iteration 29: Multi-Language Support (Arabic/English) and Interactive Drill-Down Features - All features tested successfully. Language toggle works in both desktop and mobile views. RTL layout applied correctly in Arabic mode. All drill-down navigations work as expected.
passed_tests: Frontend: Language toggle button visible in sidebar footer (data-testid=language-toggle)
Frontend: Click language toggle switches from English to Arabic
Frontend: In Arabic mode - sidebar nav labels are in Arabic (العمليات, المالية, etc.)
Frontend: In Arabic mode - Dashboard title is 'لوحة القيادة'
Frontend: In Arabic mode - stat cards titles are translated (إجمالي المبيعات, إجمالي المصروفات, صافي الربح)
Frontend: In Arabic mode - layout is RTL (dir='rtl' on html element)
Frontend: Language toggle shows 'عربي' in English mode and 'EN' in Arabic mode
Frontend: Language preference persists in localStorage (ssc_lang key)
Frontend: Visualizations page title translates to 'الرسوم البيانية' in Arabic mode
Frontend: Visualizations tab labels translated (خريطة حرارية, قمع المبيعات, شلال, رادار)
Frontend: Heatmap shows 'Click to drill down' hint text ('انقر للتفصيل' in Arabic)
Frontend: Clicking a heatmap day navigates to /reports?tab=eod&date=YYYY-MM-DD (tested with 2026-02-09)
Frontend: Clicking funnel stage 0 (Total Customers) navigates to /customers
Frontend: Clicking funnel stage 2 (Total Transactions) navigates to /sales
Frontend: Clicking a waterfall step navigates to /sales or /expenses based on type
Frontend: Clicking a radar branch card navigates to /?branch=ID
Frontend: Switch back to English correctly restores all labels and LTR layout
critical_code_review_comments: LanguageContext.jsx properly implements language toggle with localStorage persistence
RTL support is correctly applied via document.documentElement.dir attribute
i18n.js contains comprehensive translations for navigation, dashboard, visualizations, and common UI elements
DashboardLayout.jsx uses useLanguage hook and t() function for all nav labels
DashboardPage.jsx uses tr() for stat card titles (total_sales, total_expenses, etc.)
VisualizationsPage.jsx uses tr() for page title, tab labels, and drill-down hint text
App.css has proper RTL CSS overrides for border-left, margin adjustments, and text alignment
Drill-down handlers in VisualizationsPage.jsx use navigate() with proper query params
Mobile language toggle (data-testid=language-toggle-mobile) exists in mobile header
seed_data_creation: No seed data created. Used existing database data.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 29 complete. Two feature sets tested: (1) Multi-Language Support - Language toggle (data-testid=language-toggle) in sidebar footer switches between English and Arabic. Arabic mode shows RTL layout, translated nav labels (العمليات, المالية, etc.), dashboard title (لوحة القيادة), and stat cards (إجمالي المبيعات, إجمالي المصروفات, صافي الربح). Language persists via localStorage 'ssc_lang' key. (2) Interactive Drill-Down - Heatmap cells navigate to /reports?tab=eod&date=YYYY-MM-DD. Funnel stages navigate to /customers (stage 0-1) or /sales (stage 2+). Waterfall steps navigate to /sales or /expenses. Radar branch cards navigate to /?branch=ID. All translations and drill-down handlers working correctly.
mocked_apis_note: No mocked APIs. All features use real data and localStorage for language persistence.
